sglang.title: [PD][NIXL] Set is_sorted=False to fix NIXL_ERR_NOT_FOUND
sglang.author: trevor-m
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Fixes NIXL_ERR_NOT_FOUND error. The buffers passed to NIXL are not always sorted, so we can't use is_sorted=True.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Allow `CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=''` in `Platform.device_id_to_physical_device_id`
vllm.author: eicherseiji
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Since #15977, EngineCoreProc initiates the following callstack:
->  VllmConfig.__post_init__
-> CudaPlatformBase.check_and_update_config
-> is_flashmla_supported
-> NvmlCudaPlatform.get_device_capability
This causes a crash when an AsyncLLMEngine is created on a CPU-only head node with GPU worker no

vllm.title: [TPU] add kv cache update kernel
vllm.author: yaochengji
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
TPU is not good at scatter-update. Here consecutive new kv status will be updated together with the help of the kv cache update kernel.
Test Plan
Kernel test: pytest -s -v tests/v1/tpu/test_kv_cache_update_kernel.py
Accuracy test: pytest -s -v tests/entrypoints/llm/test_accuracy.py::test_lm_

vllm.title: [Refactor] Rename commnication utils
vllm.author: yewentao256
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Currently, PPLX tests also uses the parallel_launch from utils.py, not only for deepep, and we may introduces other communication backend in the future.
So I rename the deepep_utils.py to utils.py to avoid confusion.

vllm.title: [Feature] Expert Parallelism Load Balancer (EPLB)
vllm.author: abmfy
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR introduces support for dynamic load balancing in expert parallelism (EP) for the deployment of Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models.
Dynamic load balancing is essential for auxiliary-loss-free MoE models, such as the DeepSeek-V3/R1 series. This feature enables dynamic rearrangement of experts acr

vllm.author: ilmarkov
vllm.bodyExcerpt:

Tune CUTLASS configs for M <= 256 using cutlass_profiler insights.
The PR allows to get from 1.12x to 1.5x speedup for certain NxK pairs without affecting performance for the other NxK.
Cutlass profiler results.

Purpose
The fix in #19648 was disruptive for Blackwell's cutlass_moe_fp4 usage. This is because get_cutlass_moe_mm_data is used for both run_cutlass_moe_fp8 (sm90) and cutlass_moe_fp4 (sm100)
While trying to run the kernel, we see the following error:
NotImplementedError: No compiled get_cutlass_moe

Just For ROCM

vllm.title: [CI] Sync test dependency with test.in for torch nightly
vllm.author: yangw-dev
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Description
test dependency in nightly_torch_test.txt is in sync with test.txt
Why not generate the nightly_torch_test.txt  directly from  modified test.in ?
Unfortunately, even remove the torch dependencies from test.in, pip-compile still aim to  install torch stable version.
This is a workaround.

vllm.title: [Fix] Fix gemma CI test failing on main
vllm.author: tdoublep
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
The optional CI job "Language Models Test (Extended Generation)" is currently failing on main due to one of the Gemma tests that is using out-dated API calls. This PR adapts that failing test to work with latest vLLM API.
This CI job is currently the only one we have that tests hybrid SSM/at
